mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TF_ATTACHMENT ( ID, UPLOADER_USER_ID, PROJECT_ID, CATEGORY, ORIGINAL_FILE_NAME, FILE_NAME, FILE_URL, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( SEQ_TF_ATTACHMENT_PK.NEXTVAL, #{uploaderUserId}, #{projectId}, #{category}, #{originalFileName}, #{fileName}, #{fileUrl}, SYSDATE )

INSERT INTO TF_ATTACHMENT( ID, UPLOADER_USER_ID, PROJECT_ID, CATEGORY, FILE_NAME, ORIGINAL_FILE_NAME, FILE_URL, CREATED_AT ) VALUES( SEQ_TF_ATTACHMENT_PK.nextval, #{uploaderUserId}, #{projectId}, #{category}, #{fileName}, #{originalFileName}, #{fileUrl}, SYSDATE )
